$description: Legacy HSL-era tokens from www. Migration artifacts — converge toward OKLch brand values in base.json. Do not use in new code.

legacy.$description: HSL values from www site. Mapped for reference during migration. These should converge toward the OKLch brand values above.

www-primary-light.$description: www hsl(178 86% 28%) — WCAG-darkened teal for text contrast. Patina equivalent: neutral.900 as primary.

www-brand-teal.$description: www hsl(178 86% 42%) — matches brand.verdigris exactly. Used decoratively.

www-ring.$description: www hsl(153 67% 38%) — green-shifted ring/focus. Deviates from Patina's neutral ring.
